response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in software development, including embedded systems and C/C++ programming, but lacks direct experience with Linux kernel modifications, embedded networking, or security technologies like MACsec/802.1X. Proficiency in Japanese is unconfirmed. While the resume shows strong generalist skills, the role requires specialized embedded security expertise that is not clearly demonstrated.
strengths: Strong C/C++ experience with embedded systems (National Instruments, WatchUp, GISCollective)
Demonstrated ability to learn new technologies quickly and adapt to diverse domains
Proven track record in system design and architecture across multiple projects
concerns: No explicit mention of Linux kernel source-code modification or security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X)
Japanese language proficiency is not confirmed in the resume
Limited exposure to networking switch operations or embedded device firmware in the described roles
